title: Report brand
description: Per-brand theming for the report renderer. Structure, layout, fonts and spacing are fixed by the template; only the values below change between brands.

_about.description: Free-text note; ignored by the renderer.

name.description: Org name on the cover lockup and in the page footer.

mark.description: Single character shown in the logo badge on the cover.

org_tld.description: Small caps line under the org name (e.g. a domain).

colors.description: Each key maps to a --brand-* CSS variable. Omit a key to keep the template default. Values are any valid CSS colour (hex or rgba()).

indigo.description: Brand secondary; logo badge gradient start.

violet.description: Primary accent: headings, rules, links, list markers, table header border.

violet_soft.description: Soft accent: table header background and blockquote background.

accent_light.description: Light accent used to tint a single title word on the cover.

glow_violet.description: Cover glow, top-right (use rgba for transparency).

glow_indigo.description: Cover glow, bottom-left (use rgba for transparency).
